title: App Settings - General - User stays logged in after restating the app
scenario: User session persists after app restart but no passcode or Face ID prompt appears upon relaunch in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Go to App Settings → General → Account.
Restart the app (force close and reopen).
Navigate back to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: User should remain logged in. Upon reopening the app as a logged-in user, a passcode or Face ID prompt should appear depending on phone settings.
